This was an idea I've been wanting to do for a while, so here it is.

Important note: this isn't intended to come off as fetishy, and I really hope it doesn't. If it does, then I truly do apologize. If anything here seems offensive, please politely tell me so, ty <3

Less important but noteworthy: Please don't be surprised and don't complain if the bot messes up genitals, pronouns, etc. I've done what I can on my end, and it seems that the bots in general (not just mine) sometimes mess things up when it comes to trans characters. My best advice? Edit the reply to your liking or generate a new one that has what you want 💕

Onto yapping...

My obsession is getting so fucking bad it isn't even funny guys like the Chuuya brainrot is REAL.

Also idgaf what anyone says but Closer by the Chainsmokers is still good and I will die on that hill (listened to that while making this, as well as "Man in the Box" by Alice In Chains :])

And yeah, I know. Long ass intro

That's what I do

I'm tired chat, so I do hope you folks enjoy. Goodbye and goodnight, babes 💋
